title: Close the pre-gateway access model, customer usage, release history, and Wave 3 tracking gaps
summary: Records release evidence for the shipped multi-workspace access model, workspace roles, project allowlists, finance-safe billing/reporting, customer usage APIs and webhook delivery, team adoption metrics, public announcements/changelog surfaces, release-history generation hooks, and the completed Wave 3 PHP/Rust SDK qualification path.
completed_todo_items: Add team seat-limit visibility to billing and settings
Add basic team collaboration for paying tenants:
Add public `/announcements` page with chronological archive and stable detail routes
Add public `/changelog` page with chronological archive and stable detail routes
Add SEO-ready detail pages for SDK releases, feature launches, and milestone completions with backlinks to docs, integrations, and related product pages
Hook release evidence / milestone completion into announcement + changelog generation so those pages update consistently after meaningful ship events
Wave 3: ship `tokvera-php` and `tokvera-rust` with the same parity bar after Java/.NET are stable
Track team adoption metrics alongside paid conversion:
Add customer usage intelligence for SaaS builders before gateway:
Add `teams`, `team_members`, and `team_invitations` data model support
Add `tenant_memberships` so one verified user can belong to multiple workspaces
Add owner/admin-only invite and removal API
Add workspace switcher support in the dashboard session model
Add workspace roles: `owner`, `admin`, `member`, `viewer`, `finance`
Add project-scoped access policies for `member`, `viewer`, and `finance` roles
Enforce team seat caps through billing entitlements
Free plan: 1 member by default
Paid plans: capped members by tier
Add Team settings page with invite, resend, revoke, and remove actions
Add invite email flow and acceptance path
Add finance role views for invoices, usage totals, customer rollups, and exports without API-key or raw-payload admin access
Add docs for team management, seat limits, and admin responsibilities
Add first-class event dimensions for `customer_id`, `end_user_id`, `organization_id`, and optional `credit_bucket`
Add customer-wise token/cost read models and export-ready aggregates
Add `GET /v1/usage/customers` and detail/export surfaces for customer usage reconciliation
Add customer usage webhook events for usage sync, credit decrement, quota reached, and threshold alerts

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms workspace roles, project allowlists, customer usage APIs, webhook dispatch, and super-admin/customer attribution contracts.
Confirms the dashboard access model, customer usage surfaces, billing/help content, and release-history routes stay type-safe and documented.
Ensures the EXECUTION_TODO cleanup is backed by release evidence before the coordination repo is pushed.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the access-model, customer-usage, release-history, and Wave 3 tracking updates in the affected repos if workspace authorization, customer reconciliation, or public release-history generation regresses.
